'''鈭歵-zh-sh''' ('''katazhash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jol|jol]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jol|jol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-zh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| katazhash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhash|thitazhash]] || [[word:jitazhash|jitazhash]] || [[word:shitazhash|shitazhash]] || [[word:kitazhash|kitazhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhash|thuthutazhash]] || [[word:jujutazhash|jujutazhash]] || [[word:shushutazhash|shushutazhash]] || [[word:kukutazhash|kukutazhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhash|thutazhash]] || [[word:jutazhash|jutazhash]] || [[word:shutazhash|shutazhash]] || [[word:kutazhash|kutazhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhash|thutazhash]] || [[word:jutazhash|jutazhash]] || [[word:shutazhash|shutazhash]] || [[word:kutazhash|kutazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhash|thetazhash]] || [[word:jetazhash|jetazhash]] || [[word:shetazhash|shetazhash]] || [[word:ketazhash|ketazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhash|thothotazhash]] || [[word:jojotazhash|jojotazhash]] || [[word:shoshotazhash|shoshotazhash]] || [[word:kokotazhash|kokotazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhash|thotazhash]] || [[word:jotazhash|jotazhash]] || [[word:shotazhash|shotazhash]] || [[word:kotazhash|kotazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhash|thotazhash]] || [[word:jotazhash|jotazhash]] || [[word:shotazhash|shotazhash]] || [[word:kotazhash|kotazhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]] || [[word:tazhash|tazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tazhash|th忙tazhash]] || [[word:j忙tazhash|j忙tazhash]] || [[word:sh忙tazhash|sh忙tazhash]] || [[word:k忙tazhash|k忙tazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhash|thathatazhash]] || [[word:jajatazhash|jajatazhash]] || [[word:shashatazhash|shashatazhash]] || [[word:kakatazhash|kakatazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhash|thatazhash]] || [[word:jatazhash|jatazhash]] || [[word:shatazhash|shatazhash]] || [[word:katazhash|katazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhash|thatazhash]] || [[word:jatazhash|jatazhash]] || [[word:shatazhash|shatazhash]] || [[word:katazhash|katazhash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatazhash|shatazhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatazhash|goshatazhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatazhash|gokishatazhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatazhashn眉|shatazhashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkn眉|goshatazhashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhashn眉|gokishatazhashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatazhashsh毛|shatazhashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatazhashnksh毛|goshatazhashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatazhashsh毛|gokishatazhashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhashro|shatazhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkro|goshatazhashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhashro|gokishatazhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhashmu|shatazhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkmu|goshatazhashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhashmu|gokishatazhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatazhashsher|shatazhashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatazhashnksher|goshatazhashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatazhashsher|gokishatazhashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatazhashng|shatazhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkng|goshatazhashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatazhashng|gokishatazhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatazhashya|shatazhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkya|goshatazhashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatazhashya|gokishatazhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatazhashyam|shatazhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkyam|goshatazhashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatazhashyam|gokishatazhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhashn眉sh毛|shatazhashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkn眉sh毛|goshatazhashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhashn眉sh毛|gokishatazhashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhashn眉ro|shatazhashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkn眉ro|goshatazhashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhashn眉ro|gokishatazhashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhashn眉mu|shatazhashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkn眉mu|goshatazhashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhashn眉mu|gokishatazhashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhashsh毛n眉|shatazhashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhashnksh毛n眉|goshatazhashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhashsh毛n眉|gokishatazhashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhashsh毛ro|shatazhashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhashnksh毛ro|goshatazhashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhashsh毛ro|gokishatazhashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhashsh毛mu|shatazhashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhashnksh毛mu|goshatazhashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhashsh毛mu|gokishatazhashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhashron眉|shatazhashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkron眉|goshatazhashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhashron眉|gokishatazhashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhashrosh毛|shatazhashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkrosh毛|goshatazhashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhashrosh毛|gokishatazhashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhashromu|shatazhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkromu|goshatazhashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhashromu|gokishatazhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhashmun眉|shatazhashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkmun眉|goshatazhashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhashmun眉|gokishatazhashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhashmush毛|shatazhashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkmush毛|goshatazhashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhashmush毛|gokishatazhashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhashmuro|shatazhashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhashnkmuro|goshatazhashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhashmuro|gokishatazhashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
